title: stipa ligularis
intro: Stipa ligularis, also known as Rostraria tenuifolia, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system. Stipa ligularis is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and capsules, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
